interaction_history.content: Help me find the gap in multi-agent AI literature

content.main_response: What specific aspects or challenges of multi-agent AI have you already explored or identified in the existing literature?

transparency.explanation: This response was generated to prompt the user to reflect on their prior knowledge and contributions regarding multi-agent AI in order to facilitate a focused discussion.
transparency.what_to_verify: Check the latest research papers on multi-agent AI to see what challenges have been highlighted recently.
